videos.headline: Spencer Rattler hucks it deep to Xavier Legette for 42-yard TD
videos.description: Spencer Rattler throws a long ball to Xavier Legette for a 42-yard South Carolina touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Spencer Rattler hucks it deep to Xavier Legette for 42-yard TD) 2023/09/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Spencer Rattler goes long to Luke Doty for a TD
videos.description: South Carolina takes the lead late in the second quarter as Luke Doty gets free for a 36-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Spencer Rattler goes long to Luke Doty for a TD) 2023/09/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: O'Mega Blake boxes out defender for a South Carolina TD
videos.description: Spencer Rattler lobs it up to O'Mega Blake who out muscles his defender for a 7-yard touchdown right before halftime.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (O'Mega Blake boxes out defender for a South Carolina TD) 2023/09/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: LaNorris Sellers throws 50-yard deep ball to Tyshawn Russell for a TD
